channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Which Players Will Make the Cut? U.S. World Cup Soccer Roster Revealed Today
item.description: Veterans like Christian Pulisic, Weston McKennie, and Tyler Adams are expected to secure their spots on the team.

item.title: Why the French Open Is Named After Roland Garros, Who Didn't Play Tennis
item.description: Roland Garros, a WWI pilot who revolutionized aerial combat, had the Paris tennis tournament named after him in 1928.

item.title: Gulf shrimpers seek congressional aid amid rising fuel costs
item.description: The remaining Gulf shrimpers face challenges from higher gas prices and competition with cheaper imports.

item.title: Trump-backed redistricting plan rejected in South Carolina Legislature
item.description: Republican state senators, not up for election this year, rejected Trump's push to redraw districts to flip a Democratic House seat.
